untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'large impulse move' and measurement of 'impulse magnitude' with specific bar-count delays and percentage retracements ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters undefined). Impulse identification requires pattern recognition beyond allowed indicators. Signal also references 'prior shock level' which requires historical peak/trough tracking not available in indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated observable components: volume confirmation via vol_ratio_20, directional continuation via price breaking prior extremes (prev_high/prev_low), and reversal exit via close crossing impulse origin (prev_open proxy). Missing: impulse magnitude measurement, bar-count delays post-impulse, and percentage-of-impulse retracement levels. Parameters [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] require manual calibration.
